title: Upon His Spaniel Tracy.
content:
Now thou art dead, no eye shall ever see,
    For shape and service, spaniel like to thee.
    This shall my love do, give thy sad death one
    Tear, that deserves of me a million.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Upon His Spaniel Tracy.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
